name: Bakaliaros Pastos Me Kremmithia, Kalamatianos
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the salt cod into small pieces and remove the skin.
2. Soak the cod overnight in enough water to cover, changing the water 2 or 3 times.
3. Remove the cod from the water, discard the bones, rinse well, and dry thoroughly.
4. Dip the fish in flour, shaking off excess, and fry until golden brown in hot oil.
5. In the same oil, sauté onions until soft but not brown.
6. Add the sautéed onions, oil from the pan, and any remaining 1/2 cup oil to a large pot.
7. Add tomatoes and pepper; simmer for 30-45 minutes or until the onions dissolve.
8. Add the codfish and 1/2 cup hot water if needed, cover the pot, and cook for an additional 10 minutes until the liquid is absorbed and only the oil remains.
NOTE: This dish is typically made in the summer when ripe tomatoes are readily available.
